name: Benchmark Contamination Diagnostic Dataset (BCDD)
description: Perturbation-holdout pairs for 7 LLM benchmarks. Each item contains an original benchmark question paired with a semantically-equivalent perturbation. A positive gap (orig > pert accuracy) indicates memorization.
citation: Anonymous (2026). The Discriminative Half-Life of LLM Benchmarks. NeurIPS E&D.
